description: Transfers, refunds, reversals, cash withdrawals, category or Spend Pool corrections, or split purchases could be modeled inconsistently and distort exact pool/category actuals.
mitigation: Require explicit attributable relationship and assignment history; transfers contribute zero; linked refunds follow the original current category and pool; lifecycle changes compose atomically; never infer from description; validate representative examples through OQ-LEDGER-5, OQ-LEDGER-6, and OQ-LEDGER-15.
